rungs.question: What is there?
rungs.note: Description. Assembled from AI-detected observation — the only rung the engine may complete.

body.frame: Leading frame by attention share: “Korea as an aspirational, modern lifestyle” (28.7%).

frameRanking.label: Korea as an aspirational, modern lifestyle
Korea as a technologically advanced, developed nation
Korea as fascinating and hard to fully grasp
Korea as a nation defined by division & security
